description_long: This object is a large, cylindrical bomb with a matte olive-green finish, featuring two prominent capped nozzles on its top surface. Attached to its side is a smaller cylindrical tank, connected by visible piping and fittings, suggesting a pressurized or chemical component. The main body has a curved, segmented metal bracket or shield partially encircling it, possibly for mounting or stabilization. On one side, there are stenciled white markings, which may indicate identification or handling instructions. The surface appears robust and industrial, with welded seams and utilitarian hardware. The overall construction suggests a military or industrial explosive device designed for stationary deployment.
description: A large, olive-green cylindrical bomb with a side-mounted tank, capped nozzles, and a curved metal bracket, featuring stenciled markings and industrial fittings.
description_view_0: The main cylindrical body with two capped nozzles on top and a curved metal bracket attached to the side are visible.
description_view_1: The rear shows the smaller cylindrical tank fully, attached to the main body, and the bracket is seen from the side.
description_view_2: The side-mounted tank and its connecting pipework are prominent, with the bracket partially visible.
description_view_3: The stenciled white markings on the main body are clearly visible, along with the top nozzle and the side tank.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: The object features capped nozzles and a valve, suggesting a manual or mechanical triggering mechanism, possibly involving pressure release or chemical activation.
